before_state: BLUFF — pre-existing test asserted on text 'Menu' from a flow that no longer exists post-mandatory-onboarding (commit 7a0317d). Empirical run failed with 'could not find any node that satisfies: (Text contains "Menu")'. Source compiled green; instrumentation never ran the assertion.
after_state: PASSING on CZ_API34_Phone (API 34) with the OnboardingBypassRule pre-marking onboarding complete + signaling authorized. Test verifies the Menu tab renders the expected Settings entries (Trackers, Provider Credentials, Theme).

rehearsal.baseline_outcome: BUILD SUCCESSFUL — Finished 1 tests on CZ_API34_Phone(AVD) - 14
rehearsal.mutation: in feature/menu/src/main/kotlin/lava/menu/MenuScreen.kt at the menuItem rendering for the Trackers entry (line ~173): rename `Text("Trackers")` to `Text("BLUFF_RENAMED")`
rehearsal.mutation_outcome: BUILD FAILED — androidx.compose.ui.test.ComposeTimeoutException: Condition still not satisfied after 5000 ms (at Challenge01AppLaunchAndTrackerSelectionTest.kt:92) — the waitUntil for 'Trackers' text fired the timeout because the production renamed the text
rehearsal.reverted_outcome: BUILD SUCCESSFUL on re-run after the mutation was reverted

scope_limits.what_test_does_NOT_assert: Test deliberately stops at the Menu tab and does NOT navigate INTO 'Trackers'. Reason: androidx.navigation:navigation-compose has a known lifecycle race when an activity destroys while sitting on a deep route (IllegalStateException 'State must be at least \'CREATED\' to be moved to \'DESTROYED\''). Empirically observed during C1 redesign — test reached route=tracker_settings successfully but teardown crashed the test result.
scope_limits.deferred_to_separate_test: A separate test (TODO: Challenge1bTrackerSettingsContentTest) will verify the Trackers screen lists RuTracker.org + RuTor.info once the navigation library is upgraded OR a workaround is found.
scope_limits.anti_bluff_note: The current C1 is not a bluff — it makes assertions on real user-visible state (the Menu's Settings entries) that fail under deliberate production mutation. Stopping at the Menu tab is a real reduction in coverage, but it is HONEST coverage, not bluffed.

matrix_run_owed: This rehearsal was on a single AVD (CZ_API34_Phone, API 34). Per clause 6.I, the gating matrix run requires API 28, 30, 34, latest-stable, and at least one tablet form factor. The Challenge Test compiles/passes here; the matrix run produces the per-AVD attestation rows.
